title: Required fields, formatted fields, workflow restrictions and data integrity
excerpt: I need the ability to require data fields to be filled in by a specific user in a workflow before the process can progress. Ideally those fields would be formatted and locked as well after the data is entered.

posts.author: EliRoark (Eli Roark)
posts.cookedHtml: I need the ability to require data fields to be filled in by a specific user in a workflow before the process can progress. Ideally those fields would be formatted and locked as well after the data is entered.

posts.author: SuperDan (Dan Nether)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree, required or mandatory fields should be a tool of any mature database management system.

posts.author: kknause (Kaitlyn Knause)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree! We are building a very nuanced approval workflow for asset audits and this feature would save so much time needed to manually check that each field was filled out correctly.

posts.author: Patrmg (Patrmg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
In the 2024 roadmap (elevate 2023),
There was a new feature for mandatory fields. I try to have more informations about this new feature…

2024 product roadmap : define mandatory fields and validations (advanced Logic on board items) - Date? Feature requests
Hello, In the 2024 product roadmap (elevate 2023), there was a new feature : define mandatory fields and validations (advanced Logic on board items)… Do you have more informations about this new feature? When can we test it? Thank you

Thank you
